center.name: Heinrich Kuhl
center.summary: Heinrich Kuhl是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Black-capped petrel、长喙凤头鹦鹉、藍翅鸚鵡等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Fish & Wildlife Service|access-date=19 January 2024}} | genus = Pterodroma | species = hasitata | authority = (Kuhl, 1820) | range_map = Pterodroma hasitata map.svg }} The black-capped petrel (Pterodroma hasitata), also known as the diablotín, is a small seabird native to the West Indies in the genus Pterodroma

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green rosella or Tasmanian rosella (Platycercus caledonicus) is a species of parrot native to Tasmania and Bass Strait islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scaly-breasted lorikeet (Trichoglossus chlorolepidotus) is an Australian lorikeet found in woodland in eastern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern rosella (Platycercus venustus), formerly known as Brown's rosella or the smutty rosella, is a species of parrot native to northern Australia, ranging from the Gulf of Carpentaria and Arnhem Land to the Kimberley

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-capped parrot (Purpureicephalus spurius) is a species of broad-tailed parrot native to southwestern Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-winged parrot (Neophema chrysostoma), also known as the blue-banded parakeet or blue-banded grass-parakeet, is a small parrot found in Tasmania and southeast mainland Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-billed corella, also known as long-billed cockatoo or slender-billed corella (Cacatua tenuirostris), is a cockatoo native to Australia, which is similar in appearance to the little corella. This species is mostly white, with a reddish-pink face and forehead, and has a long, pale beak, which is used to dig for roots and seeds
